title: Active Game (Cartridge)
description: Defines a specific game instance within a Camporee Cartridge.

library_uuid.description: Reference to the original Library Generic Game

library_title.description: The original generic title of the game

game_title.description: The themed or display title for this specific game instance in the Camporee

id.description: Short identifier (e.g., p10) used within the Camporee
